### How does Akvile AI work?

### Use our AI tool to understand your current skin condition

Our AI tool helps you to analyze the following skin scores: acne, hydration, redness, pigmentation, pores, and uniformness. 

If any of your scores are below 80, you will receive recommendations to help your skin. 

Use this analysis to track how your skin responds to specific skin care products, dietary changes, or even climate.

### Get your personalized recommendations on a daily and monthly basis

Your skin does not work separately from your body, and triggers for each skin condition may be different. 

Does your skin react to dairy products, stress or certain ingredients? Fill out your Daily Questions to get answers and analytics on a daily or monthly basis.

### Scan the skincare products you 

use to optimize your routine

Is your skincare routine working? Improve it with akvile AI based on your skin's needs and preferences. 

We accept all skincare choices and brands, feel free to be yourself with our app!

### Our commonly asked questions

Do I need to pay to use Akvile AI?

Most of our application tools are free to use! If you want to get advanced recommendations about your skin & health, we have created a premium subscription that allows you to track your skin changes over several months to identify your unique skin patterns.

Where can I download the app?

Download the app for [iOS](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/akvile-ai-skin-health/id1503710666) and [Android](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.systemakvile&hl=en&gl=US). The app is available worldwide.

How does Akvile AI improve my skin?

Our app helps users take control of their skin. As we all know, life happens and our skin can change due to many factors: stress, new skincare, diet, allergies, new clothes, etc. But this does not mean that you cannot change your habits and routines to support your skin. And Akvile AI is your perfect tool to help you on your skin journey. Akvile AI is not a medical app, it's a holistic tool with advanced technologies inside.

How long does it take for my skin to be healthier?

We do not give you a specific time frame because every skin story is unique and requires a different amount of time. Keep in mind that it takes our skin cells at least 6 weeks to renew themselves, so this is a general time frame to notice skin changes.

Do you sell skincare products?

No, we do not currently have any skincare brands in our app.

Do you work with a dermatologist?

We work closely with our dermatologist, Dr. Gregorz Stanislawski, who's based in Hamburg, Germany. He is a great expert, that is why he became a co-founder of our company.
